item.name: Littlefoot
item.description:
This particular yeti is content in knowing that bigger is not always necessarily better.

Use item to acquire the Littlefoot minion.
item.tooltip:
It is good to see you
on your feet again.
  - Merlwyb Bloefhiswyn
item.specialactiondescription: Delivers an attack with a potency of 230 to all enemies within range.
